title: Noémie and Jess Fox on taking their sibling rivalry to the Olympics | SBS News
description: Noémie Fox was finally able to chase her Olympic dream this year after a decade competing in the shadow of her sister Jess. The pair talk to SBS News about what it was like to go head-to-head in Paris.
